summary: Completed frontend testing of Operator Landing Page feature. All 9 test cases passed. The landing page correctly shows on mobile viewport (<768px) when operator view is enabled, and hides on desktop. All 4 buttons (Report, Equipment, My Tasks, Production) work correctly.

test_cases.name: Operator landing shows on mobile viewport when toggle ON
test_cases.details: At 390px width with operatorViewEnabled=true, landing page shows with all 4 buttons

test_cases.name: Operator landing does NOT show on desktop viewport
test_cases.details: At 1920px width with operatorViewEnabled=true, regular dashboard shows

test_cases.name: Report button opens chat sidebar
test_cases.details: Clicking Report button dispatches 'open-chat' event, chat sidebar opens

test_cases.name: Equipment button opens hierarchy panel
test_cases.details: Clicking Equipment button dispatches 'open-hierarchy' event, equipment panel opens

test_cases.name: My Tasks button navigates to /my-tasks
test_cases.details: Clicking My Tasks button navigates to /my-tasks page

test_cases.name: Production button navigates to /production
test_cases.details: Clicking Production button navigates to /production page, shows production dashboard (not landing)

test_cases.name: Toggle shows ON/OFF state in avatar dropdown
test_cases.details: Toggle displays green 'ON' badge when enabled, 'OFF' when disabled

test_cases.name: Landing page disappears when toggle is OFF
test_cases.details: With operatorViewEnabled=false, regular mobile dashboard shows instead of landing

key_findings.owner_only_toggle: Toggle only visible in avatar dropdown for users with role='owner'

critical_code_review_comments: OperatorLandingPage.js is clean and well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
DashboardPage.js correctly checks isMobileViewport && isOperatorMode before rendering landing
Layout.js properly handles custom events and toggle state persistence
Good use of localStorage for state persistence across sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Operator Landing Page feature fully tested. Key files: OperatorLandingPage.js, DashboardPage.js (lines 500-520), Layout.js (lines 450-475, 998-1013). Toggle uses localStorage 'operatorViewEnabled'. Mobile breakpoint is 768px. All 4 buttons have data-testid: operator-btn-report, operator-btn-equipment, operator-btn-my-tasks, operator-btn-production.
